description: Receipt written and signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen, documenting that Abū Naṣr al-ʿAṭṭār received from the court 19 triple-weave (muthallath) garments, as set forth in the conditions, on Thursday, 10 Iyyar 1446 Seleucid = 25 April 1135 CE, in Fusṭāṭ, in the presence of Abū l-Ḥasan b. Ṣāliḥ the brother of Ṣedaqa the deceased. Signed also by Yehuda b. Yosef ha-Kohen (=Abū Zikrī?).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
